subcodes.first_line: O Kamál! Hearken unto the call of this Beauty, Who hath been made captive at the hands of the infidels and findeth none to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کمال اسمع ندآء هذا الجمال الذی ابتلی بین ایدی المشرکین و لن یجد لنفسه من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
